home.title: Prompt IDE for stock-image ideas
home.subtitle: Compose varied microstock prompts, score commercial fit, and keep repetition out of every batch.
home.featurePromptsDesc: Save reusable prompt structures and send references back to the composer.
home.featureGenerateDesc: Generate 1, 3, 5, or 10 prompt variants with commercial scoring.
home.featureStorageDesc: IndexedDB history keeps generated ideas searchable without leaving the device.
home.featureI18nDesc: Compose and manage prompts in English or Bahasa Indonesia.

formatter.pageDescription: Batch-format and queue prompts from text or CSV files
formatter.emptyDescription: Paste prompts or upload a CSV file to get started
formatter.replaceDescription: You have {{copied}} of {{total}} prompts copied. Processing new input will reset all progress.
formatter.resetDescription: This will mark all prompts as pending and reset the queue to the beginning.

prompts.name: Name
prompts.emptyDescription: Create your first prompt to get started
prompts.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt? This action cannot be undone.
prompts.duplicateError: A prompt with this name already exists

settings.pageDescription: Manage application preferences and AI configuration
settings.noPresets: No presets saved. Import or create one.
settings.noPresetsDescription: Import a preset from a file or create one to get started.
settings.savePresetDescription: Enter a name for your AI configuration preset to load it later.
settings.importPresetsDescription: Paste your JSON preset configuration here to import it.
settings.deletePresetConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this preset? This action cannot be undone.
settings.masterPromptDescription: View and edit the master system prompt sent to the AI for every generation.
settings.masterPromptWarning: Editing this affects every generation going forward. Use Reset if results get worse.
settings.masterPromptPlaceholder: The default master prompt will appear here...

history.pageDescription: View and manage your generated prompts
history.emptyDescription: Generate some prompts to see them here
history.deleteAllConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete all history? This action cannot be undone.
history.deleteFolderConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this folder and all its contents? This action cannot be undone.

templates.pageDescription: Create, edit, and manage your prompt templates
templates.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Search templates by name or content...
templates.noResultsDescription: Try adjusting your search or filter to find what you're looking for.

generator.pageDescription_v2: Generate dynamic, high-quality image prompts using the advanced composer engine.
generator.pageDescription: Generate high-quality stock image prompts with AI
generator.title: Prompt Generator
generator.nichePlaceholder: Enter a niche or leave empty for random

results.generatingDescription: The AI is analyzing your idea, applying creative strategies, and scoring the results. This may take a moment.

generator.duplicateHigh: High similarity detected — consider regenerating for more variety
generator.duplicateMedium: Medium similarity — variations may be limited

errors.noActiveConfig: No active AI config. Please set up your API key in Settings.
errors.generationFailed: Failed to generate prompts. Please try again.

apiConfigRequired.title: API Configuration Required
apiConfigRequired.description: Please configure your AI API key, endpoint, and model in settings to start composing prompts.

LLM_TIMEOUT.title: Generation Timeout
LLM_TIMEOUT.message: The request to the AI service timed out. This might be due to high server load. Please try again in a moment.

PARSE_FAILURE.title: Invalid Response
PARSE_FAILURE.message: The AI returned a response that could not be understood. Check the model compatibility or try a different niche.

PARTIAL_BATCH.title: Partial Results
PARTIAL_BATCH.message: The AI generated fewer prompts than requested. The prompts shown below may still be usable.

PROVIDER_ERROR.title: AI Provider Error
PROVIDER_ERROR.message: An error occurred with the AI service. Please check your API key and configuration in settings.

usageContext.label: Usage Context
usageContext.description: How these images will be licensed

includeDiversity.label: Diverse Representation
includeDiversity.description: Encourage age, ethnicity, and gender diversity in human subjects

includeNegativePrompts.label: Include Negative Prompts
includeNegativePrompts.description: Generate context-aware negative prompts to suppress unwanted elements

includeKeywords.label: Include Stock Keywords
includeKeywords.description: Generate relevant Adobe Stock search keywords

allowTextSpace.label: Reserve Copy Space
allowTextSpace.description: Leave negative space suitable for text overlay — increases commercial value

basePromptReference.label: Base Prompt / Reference (optional)
basePromptReference.description: Provide an existing prompt as creative inspiration. The AI will generate fresh, varied prompts anchored to this reference without copying it.
basePromptReference.placeholder: Paste or select a template as reference...

niche.placeholder: e.g., A programmer working late at night, a futuristic city skyline, a family enjoying a picnic in a sunny park...
niche.randomIdeaTooltip: Generates an idea based on your selected Category.

variationLevel.label: Variation Level
variationLevel.level1: Minimal — only 1 dimension varies. Subtle differences between variants.
variationLevel.level2: Slight — 2 dimensions vary. Noticeable but restrained variation.
variationLevel.level3: Moderate — about half of available dimensions vary. Balanced variety.
variationLevel.level4: High — most dimensions vary. Significant differences between variants.
variationLevel.level5: Maximum — all available dimensions vary. Maximum diversity across variants.

styleMode.label: Scene Mode
styleMode.tooltip: Manual lets you pick specific values for mood, colors, art style, background, and human models. Auto lets the system determine all of them based on Variation Level.
styleMode.systemDescription: System will automatically determine mood, colors, art style, background, and human models based on Variation Level.

customInstructions.label: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.placeholder: e.g., Focus on natural lighting, avoid cluttered backgrounds, emphasize textures...

includeHistory.label: Include History for Better Variations
includeHistory.description: Use recent prompts from your history to avoid generating similar content
includeHistory.tooltip: Includes this many recent prompts from the selected Category as context, so new generations avoid repeating them. Higher numbers use more tokens per generation.

diverseRepresentation.disabledTooltip: Not applicable when Human Model is set to No People

segments.title: Photography Segments
segments.unavailable: Segments not available for legacy prompts.
segments.subject: Subject

negative.title: Negative Prompt
negative.description: These descriptors are sent to the AI to suppress unwanted visual elements.

promptCard.duplicateWarning: High similarity with previous prompt detected
